featureName: BUG-020-009: Hardcoded HTTP client timeouts violate SST config-driven runtime values

executionHistory.summary: Code-review finding H-4 (P2 promoted to actionable) filed by user. internal/connector/markets/markets.go L158 carries `httpClient: &http.Client{Timeout: 10 * time.Second}` and internal/auth/oauth.go L117 carries `client := &http.Client{Timeout: 15 * time.Second}`. Both violate the SST Zero-Defaults regime in .github/copilot-instructions.md and .github/instructions/smackerel-no-defaults.instructions.md. Created 8-artifact bug folder mirroring BUG-020-008's recipe.

executionHistory.expansionReason: parent-expand discovery and documentation phases because nested runtime lacks runSubagent capability for bubbles.discovery / bubbles.documentation specialist dispatch; bubbles.bug already covered these phases at packet creation time and the parent-expand entry records that provenance explicitly per Gate G022
executionHistory.summary: Parent-expanded provenance entry for discovery + documentation phases.

TDD code change. Naming decision finalized in report.md before any code edits (yaml: connectors.financial-markets.http_timeout_seconds + auth.oauth.http_timeout_seconds; Config fields FinancialMarketsHTTPTimeoutSeconds + AuthOAuthHTTPTimeoutSeconds). RED captured: BUG020009 tests fail to BUILD against unmigrated tree (strongest possible RED — references symbols/signatures/struct fields that only exist post-migration). Implementation: 2 new Config int fields + 2 mustParseIntEnv entries + 2 Validate range guards (> 0); markets.New signature widened from New(id) to New(id, httpTimeoutSeconds) with httpClient construction now config-derived; OAuth2Config gained HTTPTimeoutSeconds field consumed by tokenRequest; 2 yaml keys added; scripts/commands/config.sh emits both env vars. GREEN: 8 BUG020009 test functions PASS post-migration (5 config + 1 markets + 2 oauth); race-detector suite PASS for all 3 primary packages; full internal/... PASS across 70+ packages; ./smackerel.sh test unit --go PASS after reconciling 2 cmd/core/markets.New callers. Helper-eradication grep exits 1. Change boundary primary: config/smackerel.yaml, internal/config/config.go, internal/connector/markets/markets.go, internal/auth/oauth.go + _test.go siblings + bug folder. Necessary plumbing deviations (audit-listed): scripts/commands/config.sh, cmd/core/connectors.go, cmd/core/main_test.go, internal/config/validate_test.go.

The mustParseIntEnv + intLoadErrs accumulator pattern is the minimum-viable form mirroring requiredVars() and BUG-020-008. markets.New signature widening is the minimal API change required to thread the config value without re-introducing a silent default.

executionHistory.summary: Parent-expanded stabilize pass: all tests deterministic. The 3-second sleep in TestBUG020009_OAuthHTTPTimeoutFromConfig is bounded by HTTPTimeoutSeconds=1 (asserts elapsed < 3s); no flakiness window. Race detector clean.

executionHistory.expansionReason: parent-expand security phase because nested runtime lacks runSubagent capability for bubbles.security dispatch during bugfix-fastlane convergence
executionHistory.summary: Parent-expanded security pass: A05 Security Misconfiguration STRENGTHENED. Operator can now tighten or loosen per-call HTTP timeouts via SST config for incident response without a rebuild. No new attack surface. No PII; fail-loud error messages name only env var keys and (for parse failures) the offending non-secret string value. No secret material touched.

executionHistory.summary: Parent-expanded docs pass: no external doc updates required. The fix is a contract-tightening already mandated by copilot-instructions SST Zero-Defaults Enforcement and .github/instructions/smackerel-no-defaults.instructions.md. Yaml comments inline at both new keys explain the SST contract and reference BUG-020-009.

certification.auditNote: Real code change (NOT artifact-only). RED captured as build-failure errors (strongest possible RED — the BUG020009 tests reference symbols/signatures/struct fields that only exist post-migration; tautological pass is impossible). GREEN confirmed: all 8 BUG020009 test functions PASS post-fix; race-detector suite PASS for all 3 primary packages; full go test ./internal/... PASS across 72 packages; ./smackerel.sh test unit --go PASS end-to-end. 2 hardcoded `time.Duration` literals removed and replaced with `time.Duration(cfg.X) * time.Second`. 2 new SST yaml keys live in config/smackerel.yaml with explicit non-empty int values; SST generator emits both env vars into dev + test bundles. mustParseIntEnv + intLoadErrs accumulator + Validate range guards (> 0) provide fail-loud coverage for missing / unparseable / non-positive values. Adversarial regression cases use non-default values (markets=7 vs pre-fix 10; OAuth=1/9 vs pre-fix 15) so a reverted migration cannot tautologically pass. Helper-eradication grep exits 1. Change boundary primary: config/smackerel.yaml + internal/config/config.go + internal/connector/markets/markets.go + internal/auth/oauth.go + their _test.go + bug folder. Necessary plumbing (audit-listed): scripts/commands/config.sh (SST env emission), cmd/core/connectors.go (single non-test markets.New caller), cmd/core/main_test.go (single test markets.New caller), internal/config/validate_test.go (setRequiredEnv seeding). SHIP_IT.

scopeProgress.name: Migrate two hardcoded http.Client{Timeout: ...} literals to SST config-driven fields
scopeProgress.notes: internal/config/config.go: 2 fields + 2 mustParseIntEnv routes + 2 Validate range guards. internal/connector/markets/markets.go: New(id) -> New(id, httpTimeoutSeconds); config-derived httpClient. internal/auth/oauth.go: OAuth2Config.HTTPTimeoutSeconds added; tokenRequest consumes it. config/smackerel.yaml: 2 new keys (10, 15). scripts/commands/config.sh: 2 new env vars (required_value + heredoc). NEW test file internal/config/bug020009_http_timeouts_test.go (5 funcs). Updated markets_test.go (1 new + 7 reconciled callers), oauth_test.go (2 new), validate_test.go (2 seedings), cmd/core/connectors.go + main_test.go (signature reconciliation). All DoD evidence inline.

tdd.rationale: Code change (2 Config field additions + 2 call-site migrations + 2 yaml additions + 8 new unit tests). NOT artifact-only. Real Red->Green evidence required.
